title: Arizona
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Arizona

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Arizona

You can apply for Medicaid in Arizona by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Arizona

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Arizona

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Arizona

CHIP in Arizona

KidsCare covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for KidsCare right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about AHCCCS-KidsCare in Arizona.

Consumer Assistance in Arizona

CHIP in Arizona

KidsCare covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for KidsCare right now.
